element_introduction_order.mastery_context: foundational - player learns third-person movement and altar positioning
understanding mana regeneration near altar and mana fountains
learning finite soul economy vs infinite mana; understanding creature classes

element_introduction_order.element: Melee, ranged, and air creature classes
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: rock-paper-scissors counter system; tactical unit selection
complementing creature attacks with targeted spells
advanced tactical positioning and mana management
map control; monopolizing mana fountains for regeneration advantage
infrastructure units; sac doctors required for altar desecration ritual
advanced unit capabilities beyond basic attack types

element_introduction_order.element: Five-god alignment system (Persephone, Charnel, James, Stratos, Pyro)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: thematic ability selection; god-based strategic identity
end-game ritual requiring sac doctor and friendly unit sacrifice

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: frenetic; requires constant micromanagement of units and positioning; tension oscillates between resource management (mana/souls) and active combat engagement

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: mana fountains scattered across world serve as optional resource nodes; monopolizing via manaliths is optional but strategic advantage

difficulty_curve.early_game: learning phase - wizard movement, basic spell casting, creature summoning mechanics introduced sequentially
difficulty_curve.mid_game: escalating unit complexity and spell variety; introduction of specialized units and area effects; map control through manaliths becomes critical
difficulty_curve.late_game: frenetic combat requiring simultaneous management of multiple army groups, formation tactics, and spell timing; opponent altar assault planning
notable_spikes: introduction of area-of-effect spells in combat
opponent securing multiple mana fountains and manaliths
endgame altar desecration ritual under defensive pressure

notable_level_patterns.description: Early game emphasizes collecting souls from map and learning mana fountain mechanics; low enemy pressure allows learning spell-casting
Mid-game shifts from resource gathering to constant unit positioning and formation management; area spells require tactical awareness
Late game demands simultaneous defense and offense; managing altar defense while executing offensive rituals
